  fhir:StructureDefinition.description [ fhir:value "Automated Collision Notification (ACN) telematics data for NEMSIS eInjury.11–.29: providing company, incident identifiers, date/time, GPS location, vehicle description, impact and delta velocity data, rollover, seat location, seatbelt use, and airbag deployment reported by the vehicle telematics system."] ;
  fhir:StructureDefinition.jurisdiction [
     fhir:index 0 ;
     fhir:CodeableConcept.coding [
       fhir:index 0 ;

       fhir:Coding.display [ fhir:value "United States of America" ]
     ]
  ] ;

     fhir:StructureDefinition.mapping.name [ fhir:value "RIM Mapping" ]
  ] ;

       fhir:ElementDefinition.comment [ fhir:value "NEMSIS eInjury.22. Usage: Optional. Change in velocity at impact reported by vehicle telemetry; NEMSIS VelocityUnit attribute determines MPH (UCUM [mi_i]/h) or KPH (km/h). Repeating (0..M) — one repetition per impact." ] ;

       fhir:ElementDefinition.comment [ fhir:value "The implicit precision in the value should always be honored. Monetary values have their own rules for handling precision (refer to standard accounting text books)." ] ;

       fhir:ElementDefinition.definition [ fhir:value "How the value should be understood and represented - whether the actual value is greater or less than the stated value due to measurement issues; e.g. if the comparator is \"<\" , then the real value is < stated value." ] ;
       fhir:ElementDefinition.requirements [ fhir:value "Need a framework for handling measures where the value is <5ug/L or >400mg/L due to the limitations of measuring methodology." ] ;

       fhir:ElementDefinition.comment [ fhir:value "The preferred system is UCUM, but SNOMED CT can also be used (for customary units) or ISO 4217 for currency.  The context of use may additionally require a code from a particular system." ] ;

  fhir:StructureDefinition.differential [
     fhir:StructureDefinition.differential.element [
       fhir:index 0 ;
       fhir:Element.id [ fhir:value "Extension" ] ;
       fhir:ElementDefinition.path [ fhir:value "Extension" ] ;
       fhir:ElementDefinition.short [ fhir:value "EMS ACN Incident" ] ;
       fhir:ElementDefinition.definition [ fhir:value "Automated Collision Notification (ACN) telematics data for NEMSIS eInjury.11–.29: providing company, incident identifiers, date/time, GPS location, vehicle description, impact and delta velocity data, rollover, seat location, seatbelt use, and airbag deployment reported by the vehicle telematics system." ]
     ], [
       fhir:index 1 ;
       fhir:Element.id [ fhir:value "Extension.extension:company" ] ;
       fhir:ElementDefinition.path [ fhir:value "Extension.extension" ] ;
       fhir:ElementDefinition.sliceName [ fhir:value "company" ] ;
       fhir:ElementDefinition.short [ fhir:value "eInjury.11 - ACN System/Company Providing ACN Data" ] ;
       fhir:ElementDefinition.comment [ fhir:value "NEMSIS eInjury.11. Usage: Optional. Name of the telematics company providing the ACN data." ] ;
       fhir:ElementDefinition.min [ fhir:value "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
       fhir:ElementDefinition.max [ fhir:value "1" ]
     ], [
       fhir:index 2 ;
       fhir:Element.id [ fhir:value "Extension.extension:company.extension" ] ;
       fhir:ElementDefinition.path [ fhir:value "Extension.extension.extension" ] ;
       fhir:ElementDefinition.max [ fhir:value "0" ]
